summary: BeatCam Studio: 17/17 backend pytest cases passed (projects CRUD, multipart upload, clips add/delete, compile with FFmpeg, media serving, 400 on empty compile, 404 errors). Compiled output mp4 verified via ffprobe to have both video+audio streams with duration ~6s (matches audio). Frontend: Projects List (loaded state with 1 card), Studio (camera permission gate), and Preview (auto-compiled, video stage + Recompile/Open/Export & Share buttons) all render cleanly on mobile viewport without red-screen errors. No deprecated Expo packages (uses expo-audio + expo-camera). Minor: DMSans font files fail to decode on web (cosmetic, fallback font kicks in), Expo SDK has 3 packages slightly out of expected patch versions, deprecated style prop warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents).

issues: DMSans-Regular/Bold/Medium fonts return 'invalid sfntVersion: 168430090' on web preview; browser falls back to system font. The asset is being served as something other than a TTF (likely 'AAAA' bytes from a 404/HTML wrapper). Check expo-font asset bundling for web.

react_native_issues.issue: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated on RN Web; replace with 'boxShadow' for cross-platform compatibility. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:335-338 (fab shadow)
props.pointerEvents is deprecated; move to style.pointerEvents. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:242, /app/frontend/app/studio/[id].tsx:277,283, /app/frontend/app/preview/[id].tsx:132,197
Out-of-date patch versions: expo@54.0.34 (expected ~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (expected ~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (expected ~6.0.24). Run `npx expo install --check` to align.

testID='preview-video' on <VideoView/> in /app/frontend/app/preview/[id].tsx:104 does not propagate to a queryable DOM element on web (selector returns absent even though player renders). Consider wrapping in a testID'd <View> for testability.

action_items: (Optional / low priority) Fix DMSans font web bundling so custom typography renders correctly on web preview.
(Optional) Migrate deprecated 'shadow*' style props to 'boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents' to 'style.pointerEvents'.
(Optional) Run `npx expo install --check` to bump expo, expo-font, expo-router to expected patch versions.
(Optional) Wrap VideoView with a testID'd parent View for E2E testability on web.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is concise (~295 lines), handles _id exclusion via clean_project(), uses async motor + asyncio subprocess for ffmpeg, env-driven Mongo config, proper 400/404 error paths. Solid.
Frontend api.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly with no hardcoded URLs. fullUrl helper handles relative/absolute paths.
All interactive elements have testID attributes for testability (project-card-*, new-project-fab, record-btn, play-toggle, filter-*, menu-delete-clip, export-share-btn, etc.).
Camera/mic permission gate is implemented correctly with both granted + blocked paths.
Auto-compile on first preview-open + manual recompile-on-demand flow is well structured.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 screens render, all expected testIDs present except VideoView testID limitation noted)

seed_data_creation: Used existing project bf7da05e-8601-4fca-976a-baafea35958c (Test MV, 2 clips, compiled) for frontend navigation tests. Test mp3/mp4 fixtures generated in /tmp/beatcam_media via ffmpeg. Pytest creates/destroys its own TEST_beatcam project.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_beatcam_api.py - covers all 8 endpoints + 400/404 edge paths + ffprobe-validated compile output. Run with: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<public-url> pytest backend/tests/test_beatcam_api.py -v. Frontend: camera/recordAsync + gallery picker + DocumentPicker file uploads cannot be exercised on web preview — only screen rendering and navigation are testable in the browser. Public URL: https://music-vision-3.preview.emergentagent.com
rca_of_issue: No bugs to RCA. Backend compile pipeline verified end-to-end: black canvas + scaled/cropped clips at song_start positions overlaid with audio track via ffmpeg filter_complex; output served as static FileResponse. Confirmed mp4 has video+audio streams with duration ≈ audio_duration.
